introduce.title: What is OneAIHub?

usage.title: Create with OneAIHub in four steps
usage.description: A simple workflow for exploring chat, image, and music generation:

items.title: Sign in
items.description: Create an account and get ready to use your OneAIHub workspace.

items.title: Choose an AI tool
items.description: Start with AI Chat, AI Image Generator, or AI Music Generator based on your task.

items.title: Create with credits
items.description: Use credits to generate responses, visuals, and music from your prompts.

items.title: Review your history
items.description: Return to previous chats and AI tasks whenever you need to continue or reuse results.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Learn how OneAIHub helps you create with chat, images, music, and credits.

items.question: What is OneAIHub?
items.answer: OneAIHub is an all-in-one AI platform for AI chat, AI image generation, AI music generation, credits, and creative AI workflows.

items.question: What AI tools are included?
items.answer: The first version focuses on AI Chat, AI Image Generator, and AI Music Generator, with account history and credit-based usage.

items.question: Do I need credits to use AI tools?
items.answer: Yes. AI tools use credits, and new users can start with free trial credits before upgrading or purchasing more.

items.question: Can I generate images and music from text prompts?
items.answer: Yes. You can describe the visual or music idea you want, submit a prompt, and review generated results in your account.

items.question: Where can I find previous AI tasks?
items.answer: Your activity pages keep track of chats and AI generation tasks so you can revisit results later.

items.question: How do payments and credits work?
items.answer: Pricing plans and credit packs let you add more credits when you need higher usage for chat, image, and music generation.
